reason: Statusline runtime must degrade gracefully for missing stdin/transcript fields without crashing or noisy output.
Runtime changes must keep stdin compatibility centralized, transcript parsing bounded/tolerant, and pass required verification.
No-argument statusline execution must not emit diagnostics or debug logs while handling missing data.
Context and Tasks display changes must stay in terminal renderer functions and preserve compact statusline output.
Claude stdin and transcript payloads are untrusted flexible JSON and need strict narrowing without broad any.
